title: Semantic Intelligence, 3D Modeling and Embodied Interaction Lab
objective: 在不偏离 Personal Knowledge Asset OS 初始设想的前提下，正式实现语义智能实验室能力：向量嵌入、聚类分类、大语言模型 Agent、Three.js 3D 知识图谱、WebGPU 本地计算、MediaPipe 手势识别和科学可视化分析

tasks.title: Build embedding-ready corpus and chunk pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Corpus chunks have stable ids, source provenance, public/private boundary metadata and text suitable for embedding
Private source content is excluded from public embedding artifacts unless explicitly whitelisted
Chunk pipeline can run locally and does not send personal knowledge assets to remote APIs by default
tasks.notes: Remote embedding providers require separate approval; local or fixture-based embeddings are preferred first.

tasks.title: Implement vector embedding and similarity index prototype
acceptance_criteria: Vector index supports similarity lookup between public chunks
Embedding generation is reproducible or fixture-backed for tests
The system records model/version metadata and avoids silent remote inference
tasks.notes: Use local models, deterministic fixtures, or explicit human-approved providers only.

tasks.title: Add clustering and topic modeling layer
acceptance_criteria: Clusters combine deterministic taxonomy, graph topology and vector similarity
Cluster labels are inspectable and editable by the admin workflow
Public visualization can show cluster membership without exposing private notes
tasks.notes: This upgrades S09 deterministic taxonomy into semantic clustering.

tasks.title: Implement Three.js 3D knowledge graph prototype
acceptance_criteria: 3D graph uses Three.js and supports orbit, zoom, node selection and cluster coloring
2D fallback remains available and is the default for reduced-motion or unsupported devices
Performance, mobile framing and nonblank canvas are verified before promotion
tasks.notes: 3D is opt-in and must follow lab-input-policy.

tasks.title: Add MediaPipe gesture navigation experiment
acceptance_criteria: Gesture controls require explicit camera permission and can be disabled immediately
Mouse, touch and keyboard controls remain fully usable without camera access
Camera streams are released when leaving the page or disabling gestures
tasks.notes: Sensitive device access must be opt-in only.

tasks.title: Prototype WebGPU local semantic analytics
acceptance_criteria: Feature detects WebGPU and falls back to CPU/WASM or static analytics
Analytics panel can compute or visualize similarity, density, cluster spread and graph centrality
No user knowledge assets are uploaded to external services
tasks.notes: This realizes the original WebGPU semantic computing direction in a gated lab.

tasks.title: Design and implement local LLM Agent workflow prototype
acceptance_criteria: Agent workflows cover summarize, classify, suggest links, detect privacy risk and draft publication notes
Agent outputs are suggestions only and require human approval before changing content or publish status
Provider choice, data boundary and model invocation risk are documented before any remote model call
tasks.notes: LLM Agent must never silently publish, rewrite or upload private knowledge assets.
